files_replaced: src/spy_der/contracts/models.py MarketForecastBundle stub replaced by contracts/forecasts.py
files_deferred: Full nested crossfit hyperparameter search (crossfit_classifier/regressor grids) -> later training pass; expanding session folds + train-only calibration established.
Isotonic calibrator selection gates and nested holdout comparison -> available but not the default path.
HistGradientBoosting direction challenger -> elastic-net logistic first.
Full offline build_dataset_from_recording against chain_store -> deferred until recording parity with System A store.
Candidate outcome labels (spec §54.2) -> Phase 7/8 candidate economics.
behavior_preserved: As-of rule: future-stamped sources raise AsOfViolation; missing values are explicit.
Labels use log returns; horizons past close are None; same-bar target+stop is adverse-first.
Folds are session-grouped with whole-session embargo; calibration uses train-only scores.
Registry schema v2 requires calibration/fold/OOF audit fields; artifact hash mismatch fails closed.
Serving modes are gated by model/group status; missing required inputs fail closed.
intentional_changes: PredictionBundle renamed to MarketForecastBundle with SPY-DER identity fields (forecast_id, content_hash, deployment_id).
Session metadata uses spy_der.market_data.calendar.MarketCalendar instead of System A market_calendar helpers.
bars_asof operates on canonical Bar tuples (and array index helper) rather than resample.RawBars.
Direction model uses a session-holdout calibrator rather than full nested OOF crossfit for Phase 5 scope.
Added scikit-learn and joblib runtime dependencies.
known_gaps: Nested HP search and full OOF crossfit for all V2 heads are deferred.
Return-quantile/volatility/range/barrier models are implemented but not yet wired into the default parity group (direction-only golden).
Heuristic bundle is research/shadow only; no live vendor feature-row adapter yet.
Candidate labels and full recording->dataset rebuild remain deferred.
rollback: Revert the Phase 5 commit. Phases 0-4 are unaffected.
Remove scikit-learn and joblib from pyproject if rolling back the dependency addition.
next_phase: Phase 6 — V3 forecasting (spec §63): uncertainty, OOD, regime probabilities, mixture-of-experts, conformal, competing risks, path model, forecast ensemble.
